title: Polymer Patch for Blockus
description: A Polymer Patch mod for Blockus, allowing it to work fully server side!
body:
# Polymer Patch for Blockus
This is a patch for [Blockus](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockus), making it work fully server side, with all of its functionality intact.

Blockus is required and not included within this mod.

This mod requires server resource pack, about which setup you can read here: https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/

You can read more about [Blockus on it's Modrinth page](https://modrinth.com/mod/blockus)!
